title: RP Renames
description: View all Resource Pack Renames in a new anvil GUI catalog!
body:
[![paypal.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HiWord9/RPRenames/extra/links/paypal.png)](https://www.paypal.me/hiword9)[![thx4donation.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HiWord9/RPRenames/extra/links/thx4donation.png)](https://www.paypal.me/hiword9)
[![modrinth.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HiWord9/RPRenames/extra/links/modrinth.png)](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)[![curseforge.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HiWord9/RPRenames/extra/links/curseforge.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rp-renames)[![github.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HiWord9/RPRenames/extra/links/github.png)](https://github.com/HiWord9/RPRenames)[![discord.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HiWord9/RPRenames/extra/links/discord.png)](https://discord.gg/3Q699k7qHr)| ---|--- **See every CIT and CEM Rename from ur resource packs in anvil menu right in game!** This is a client sided mod that helps searching for good costumize for ur tools or other items with ur resource packs. It shows every possible name requared for new texture, so u can just click on it and give ur item new look. ![CIT list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84eb41c031698153b87e4c63961f72342007a6e7.png) ![Previews!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hvqcuDMT/images/713c175aecc1eaffa7a715bdef732e30c11bcce1.png) Creative Tab!|CEM Support! ---|--- ![Creative Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hvqcuDMT/images/c449b37cc335faeaa049de72f736fac23670c55e.png)|![cem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hvqcuDMT/images/e0d9636c217069d9af43733828e306a0f4d8d383.png) ![Built-in Resource Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hvqcuDMT/images/9bb2bceef6b3eb0f255f0fd7308de58bec433e86.png) New Roleplay Experience! U don't need to search in giant list of renames on resource pack's site or somewhere else for one rename, now it is right in ur Minecraft!
